parameters.name: sfs_uid
parameters.description: SFS file-system UID.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: cycle_type
parameters.description: Subscription cycle type: year or month.

parameters.name: cycle_count
parameters.description: Subscription cycle count: 1-36 months or 1-3 years, with a maximum total term of three years.

parameters.name: client_token
parameters.description: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.

examples: ctyun sfs file-system renew --sfs-uid e828a6e7-e1ed-5528-968a-9dd7077395d2 --cycle-type month --cycle-count 10

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: permission_group_name
parameters.description: Permission-group name containing 2-63 letters, digits, or hyphens; it cannot start with a digit or hyphen or end with a hyphen.

parameters.name: network_type
parameters.description: Permission-group network type; only private_network is supported.

parameters.name: permission_group_description
parameters.description: Permission-group description containing at most 128 Chinese or English characters.

examples: ctyun sfs permission-group create --permission-group-name pgtest1 --network-type private_network

parameters.name: client_token
parameters.description: Unique client token retained for 24 hours and used to make the order request idempotent.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: is_encrypt
parameters.description: Whether the file system is encrypted; default is false. Encrypted creation requires an available symmetric KMS key.

parameters.name: kms_uuid
parameters.description: KMS key UUID; required when encryption is enabled and limited to an available symmetric KMS key.

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Enterprise project ID; default is 0 for the default project.

parameters.name: sfs_type
parameters.description: SFS storage type: capacity for standard storage or performance for performance storage.

parameters.name: sfs_protocol
parameters.description: File-system protocol: nfs for Linux or cifs for Windows.

parameters.name: sfs_name
parameters.description: SFS file-system name containing 2-255 letters, digits, or hyphens; it cannot start with a digit or hyphen or end with a hyphen.

parameters.name: sfs_size
parameters.description: SFS file-system capacity in GB, subject to the operation's quota and resource-pool size constraints.

parameters.name: on_demand
parameters.description: Billing mode; default is true for on-demand billing. Cycle type and count are required when false for subscription billing.

parameters.name: cycle_type
parameters.description: Subscription cycle type: year or month.

parameters.name: cycle_count
parameters.description: Subscription cycle count: 1-36 months or 1-3 years, with a maximum total term of three years.

parameters.name: az_name
parameters.description: Availability-zone name. It is equivalent to zoneName; the portal identifies azName as the canonical field.

parameters.name: vpc_id
parameters.description: VPC ID used to create the file system.

parameters.name: subnet_id
parameters.description: Subnet ID in the selected VPC; required in a 3.0 resource pool but not unconditionally required for every resource-pool version.

parameters.name: order_num
parameters.description: Number of identically configured file systems to create, from 1 to 10 and subject to quota; default is 1.

examples: ctyun sfs file-system create --sfs-type performance --sfs-protocol nfs --sfs-name sfs-2023-0314-1658 --sfs-size 512 --vpc-id vpc-2ophm4xirb

parameters.name: permission_group_name
parameters.description: Updated permission-group name; supply at least one of the name and description.

parameters.name: permission_group_description
parameters.description: Updated permission-group description; supply at least one of the name and description.

parameters.name: permission_group_fuid
parameters.description: SFS permission-group FUID.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region ID used to scope the request.

parameters.name: auth_address
parameters.description: Authorised IPv4 or IPv6 host or network; * permits every source address.

parameters.name: rw_permission
parameters.description: Permission-rule access mode: rw for read-write or ro for read-only access.

parameters.name: user_permission
parameters.description: NFS user mapping; only no_root_squash is supported.

parameters.name: permission_rule_priority
parameters.description: Unique rule priority from 1 to 400, where 1 is the highest priority and the default.

examples: ctyun sfs permission-rule create --permission-group-fuid 3d69c5b8-699a-53c4-bd85-d70e93a658eb --auth-address 0.0.0.0/24 --rw-permission ro --user-permission no_root_squash --permission-rule-priority 1

parameters.name: auth_address

parameters.name: rw_permission
parameters.description: Permission-rule access mode: rw for read-write or ro for read-only access.

parameters.name: user_permission
parameters.description: NFS user mapping; only no_root_squash is supported.

parameters.name: permission_rule_priority
parameters.description: Updated unique rule priority from 1 to 400, where 1 is highest and the default; conflicts use the higher-priority rule.

examples: ctyun sfs permission-rule update --permission-rule-fuid 3d69c5b8-699a-53c4-bd85-d70e93a658eb --auth-address 10.151.11.11/24 --rw-permission ro --user-permission no_root_squash --permission-rule-priority 1
